name: Divide By Sheep 2
short_description: In this colorful cartoon world, you will never think that math can be boring! Solve ever-changing puzzles with our fluffy sheep, divide like never before and get the most of an adventure full of riddles! Can you conquer the evil grim reaper from flooding the sheep and become the ultimate math hero?
detailed_description:
In this colorful cartoon world, you will never think that math can be boring! Solve ever-changing puzzles with our fluffy sheep, divide like never before and get the most of an adventure full of riddles! Can you conquer the evil grim reaper from flooding the sheep and become the ultimate math hero? You can count on a 'shear' good time in this fun puzzle and math game!

  • Sheep can’t breathe under water, solve over 150 puzzles to free them or drown them if you fail
  • Slice them, feed them to the wolves, let the Kraken have some - DIVIDE THEM in any way imaginable
  • We’re not sheepish about dark humor - sorry kids parental guidance is advised
  • Enjoy an well crafted, cozy, cartoon art style as you commit serious math
